family_summary: Israeli invasion of Lebanon beginning 6 June 1982, followed by the southern campaign, the siege of West Beirut, the PLO evacuation, and the Sabra-Shatila massacre within the wider Lebanese Civil War.
notes: Research window constrained to 1982-06-06 through 1982-09-30, with episode-first splitting and emphasis on Beirut and south-Lebanon denominator footprints.
